name: feishu-project-official
label: 飞书项目
description: 飞书项目（Meego）操作工具。支持查询和管理工作项、节点流转、视图查询、个人待办、排期统计等功能。Use when user needs to work with Feishu/Lark Meego project management — including querying work items, creating/updating work items, completing workflow nodes, checking views, listing todos, analyzing schedules/workloads, or searching with MOQL. 关键词：飞书项目、meego、工作项、需求、任务、缺陷、排期、视图、待办、节点。
author: official
